npcs.name: Chil
dialogueStages: Seems like you just woke up as well, Pint. Last night's situation is total chaos.
We were both chatting in front of your room until we heard the guard screaming in the direction of the Grand Hall.
We then ran there together, but suddenly an earthquake happened.
I wonder what happened. Oh look! It's Mr. Guard.
He seems to have just woken up as well. Let's talk to him.
Let's hear what the guard wants to say.
I didn't see my sister anywhere here. Based on the guard's words, we should investigate the pond.
He is already in the center of the pond. I can not go there because I'm allergic to lilies.
Sis...Sis May, why...why...? (hugs May's cold body).
While you were investigating the Grand Hall surroundings, the guard and I have properly placed Sis May in the autopsy bed inside the Researcher Lab.
The worst thing is that we are totally isolated now because of last night's earthquake. We can not communicate with others.
But we decided to confront Dr. Seegy first. Do you remember any other ways to open this room?
Hey Pint, what are you doing inside the warehouse?
Call us whenever you need any help.
I demand your explanation, Dr.Seegy.
Personally, I don't think it's a suicide. A proud person like Sis May would not do that.
You said that you found some burnt rope and a spotlight near the Grand Hall.
I suspected that the murderer used some kind of trick to burn the rope.
Hmm? You want to borrow my lantern to check on the forests because there are your footsteps?
Go ahead, just take my key from that table and get my lantern in my room before going to the forests.
...(Chil is busy tidying up May's belongings)
What happens?
(unconscious)

npcs.name: Guard
npcs.description: The only guard in this complex.
dialogueStages: ...(The guard half consciously staring at you).
May,May...I saw she... leapt into the pond just like that.
I...found May at the bottom of the pool.
Would you help me gather some of May's belongings? I will take her to Chil's place.
I think it's some cigarettes.
I suspected that our lead researcher, Dr. Seegy, is involved in this matter.
I saw May hit him with a brick last night, and when I chased May from the warehouse and waited for her in front of her room, I did not find her.
Then, when I went back, Dr. Seegy was gone. I assumed that he got up and went to his room, as I heard he locked his room.
I then went back to guard the main Researcher Lab door as usual until I heard that...(sigh)
(banging on the door)
Stay safe.
I saw May attacked you last night, did you do it for revenge?
(unconscious)

npcs.name: May
npcs.description: Chil's sister, a fellow friend and researcher.
dialogueStages: ...(Deceased: Mayningg A.L.L (Mayningg Arla Luft Lambert))
(Based on your forensic knowledge, you are certain that May's death is caused by drowning).
(Some lily pollens fell from May's body, as if they are mourning for her).

npcs.name: Safe Box
npcs.description: A safe box to store valuable things.
dialogueStages: Hello.
The safe box is already opened.

npcs.name: Seegy
npcs.description: The lead researcher in this complex. He is also the teacher of all of you.
dialogueStages: ...(Dr. Seegy sleeps soundlessly inside his room)
Hey Pint, what's up? Hmm... what do you say? Where is May?
I thought I had told you that I would do some experiments with May last night after supper.
But accidents happen... I guess. Yeah, you know she is reluctant to do the mirror experiment like you.
By the way, you seems to be taller, Pint
Hmm, explanation? Revenge? I did not do anything of that kind.
I am also startled to hear this news. Although I already have a feeling that her life is not long.
That is why you guys gathered here in this early morning heh.
Oh my pitiful student, May…May your soul rest in peace.
Oh, everyone is here, including the two Pints. And oh, it's the murderer, Chil.
Chil, your method is too obvious. I saw through it at my first glance, and I think Pints have already figured it out too.
But it's not that important anymore. Today, I invite all of you, my students, to witness my grand experiment.

I will use this Lily Pond as the medium for my mirror experiment after the inspiration from the successful experiment from Pint. Although I am still a bit sad that you have kept the other Pint a secret for this whole time.
After all, for years of optical research, I've tried to prove that the mirror world is real. Even you, Pint, cannot stop me this time.
Anyway, let's start.
Heh, you think you can defeat me?

npcs.name: Shadow
npcs.description: An unknown shadow in the forest.
dialogueStages: ...(Maybe the shadow will speak if you take the mirror).
Do y*u re***ber who I **?
I ** t*e o*ly witness. May *** not commit sui*cid*.
Take **** mir*or **** **u *** go home.

npcs.name: 'Pint'
dialogueStages: Ahh it's so good to be home. After all, I have made this room to be more stable for us.
Oh what do I mean? Sorry...I'm too excited to see you after all, my shadow. Or maybe I'm the shadow? Hehe
You noticed it, right, Pint? Those footsteps and fall marks are all mine.
Ahh you are right. Our situation right now is a product of the mirror experiment.
I only told May about this, and she does not want it.
I actually have to add sedatives to everyone's soup, except Dr. Seegy and mine.
But, I betrayed him. I cooperated with May. I want to run away from here through the West Forest, while May wants to get the lead researcher position.
So, I added only to his bowl. I don't care about anything here, except you and me.
Then, when I woke up, the mirror was gone. I'm afraid that you will disappear, so I quickly looked for you.
Then, I found the mirror beside the Lily Pond and May is struggling by holding on the Grand Hall roof.
I realized it and moved the mirror, but it's too late. She fell. I saw the guard coming my way.
I quickly ran to the forest, and yeah, I think you know what happened next.
Mhm.. I think so too. By the way...
What is he up to this time?
Oh no, the mirror world is merging and Chil becomes unconscious due to the force
We are still here because we are more accustomed to this.
Right now, only a real person who has experience with the mirror world can touch him and defeat him by disturbing his experiment...
Wait for me!
Pint, you are actually the shadow in the mirror. I am the real Pint.
But, it's okay, I am you and you are me. Go live an adventurous life that you could not imagine before! Right, Pint? Or should I call you the 'player', the only real 'person' in this story?
